list.name: Changes
list.comment: feat: migrate project to Spring Boot, add validation and security - added spring-boot-starter-web - added spring-boot-starter-data-jpa - added spring-boot-starter-validation (Hibernate Validator) - added spring-boot-starter-security - updated project structure for Spring Boot - removed manual Spring context configuration - updated project version to 0.2.1

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Gradle.AccountServiceTest (1).executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.givenExistingAddress_whenAddingUser_thenSuccess.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateAddress_WhenExistUserHaveNewAddress.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserHasLibrariansSizeMoreThanOne.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserHasLibrariansSizeNotEqualsOne.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserHasNoLibrarians.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountServiceTest.whenAddingUser_thenNewLibrarianIsCreatedAndAssigned.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldCorrectlyDeleteUserWithLibrarian.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldCorrectlyRemoveLibrarian.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateUser_WhenAddressIsTheSame.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldCreateLibrarian_WhenSavingNewUserWithLibrarianRole.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldCreateLibrarian_WhenUpdatingUserWithLibrarianRole.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldCreateNewUser_WhenUserDoseNotExist.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceIntegrationTest.shouldNotDeleteAddress_WhenUserIsDeleted.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest (1).executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.givenExistingAddress_whenAddingUser_thenSuccess.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.givenUserDoesNotExist_whenAddingUser_thenUserIsPersisted.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateAddress_WhenExistUserHaveNewAddress.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCreateNewAddressAndRemoveUserFromOld_WhenUpdatingUserWithChangedAddressAndOldAddressIsShared.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCreateNewStandardUser_WhenAddressExist.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCreateNewStandardUser_WhenEmailDoesNotExist.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCreateNewStandardUser_WhenEmailDoesNotExistAndAddressExistAndIsShared.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCreateNewStandardUser_WhenEmailDoesNotExistAndAddressIsNew.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldCreateNewUser_WhenUserIsLibrarian.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserHasAddressIsEmptyOrNull.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserHasLibrariansSizeNotEqualsOne.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserIsEmpty.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenUserHasNoAddress.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenUserIsNull.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.shouldUpdateUserRoleToLibrarian_WhenUserIsUpdated.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.test.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceTest.whenAddingUser_thenNewLibrarianIsCreatedAndAssigned.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceUnitTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceUnitTest.shouldThrowException_WhenEmailIsUseByOtherUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AccountUserServiceUnitTest.shouldThrowException_WhenEmailIsUsedByAnotherUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldAddUserToAddress_WhenAddressIsNew.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCorrectlyAddUserToAddress.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCorrectlyCreateNewAddress_WhenCreateIsNewUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCorrectlyDissociateUserFromAddress.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCorrectlyDissociateUserFromAddress_WhenOnlyUserUseThisAddress.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCorrectlyFindExistingAddress_WhenCreateIsNewUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateAddress_WhenAddressExistWithoutId.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCreateNewAddress_WhenAddressIsUpdateAndAddressIsDifferent.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldCreateNewAddress_WhenUserProvidesAddressWithoutIdAndItDoesNotExist.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldDissociateUserFromOldAddressAndReturnFoundAddress_WhenUpdatingToExistingAddressDetails.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldDissociateUserFromOldAddressAndReturnNewAddress_WhenUpdatingToExistingAddressDetails.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldFindExistingAddress_WhenAddressNotUpdateAndAddressIsTheSame.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldFindExistingAddress_WhenAddressWithoutIdAndAddressExists.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldUpdateAddress_WhenAddressIsUpdateAndAddressIsDifferent.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressManagerTest.shouldUpdateAddress_WhenAddressIsUpdatedAndDifferent.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressServiceTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressServiceTest.shouldCorrectlyCreateNewAddress_WhenAddressIdIsNullAndAddressDoesNotExist.executor": "Coverage", "Gradle.AddressServiceTest.shouldCorrectlyUpdateAddress_WhenAddressHasNonId.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressServiceTest.shouldFindExistingAddress_WhenAddressIdIsNullAndAddressAlreadyExists.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AddressServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenDoseNotFindAddressById.executor": "Run", "Gradle.AppTest.test.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Build LibraryManager.executor": "Run", "Gradle.CreateUserServiceIntegrationTest.addUserWhenDoesNotExist.executor": "Run", "Gradle.CreateUserServiceIntegrationTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.CreateUserServiceIntegrationTest.test.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Download Sources.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.shouldCorrectlySaveLibrarianWithUser.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenLibrariansCountIsNotOne.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.shouldThrowExceptionWhenUserHasLibrariansSizeNotEqualsOne.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenNotFoundLibrarianByUserId.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.shouldThrowsExceptionWhenLibrariansIsEmpty.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibrarianServiceTest.shouldThrowsExceptionWhenLibrariansIsNull.executor": "Debug", "Gradle.LibraryManager [:org.library.ApplicationRunning.main()].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [buildDependents].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [build].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [check].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [clean test].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [clean].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [compileTestJava].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [jar].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [testClasses].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [test].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManager [updateDaemonJvm].executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManagerSimulationTest.test.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManagerTest.executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManagerTest.test (1).executor": "Run", "Gradle.LibraryManagerTest.test.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Load Gradle Dependencies.executor": "Run", "Gradle.TestTest.test.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Tests in 'LibraryManager.test'.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Tests in 'org.library'.executor": "Run", "Gradle.Tests in 'org.library.integration'.executor": "Coverage", "Gradle.Tests in 'org.library.unit'.executor": "Run", "Gradle.UserServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenNotFoudUserByEmail.executor": "Run", "Gradle.UserServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenNotFoudUserByUserName.executor": "Run", "Gradle.UserServiceTest.shouldThrowException_WhenNotFoundUserById.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SONARLINT_PRECOMMIT_ANALYSIS": "true", "com.intellij.testIntegration.createTest.CreateTestDialog.defaultLibrary": "JUnit5", "com.intellij.testIntegration.createTest.CreateTestDialog.defaultLibrarySuperClass.JUnit5": "", "dart.analysis.tool.window.visible": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "master", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "kotlin-language-version-configured": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "/home/piotr/Programming/Project/LibraryManager/src/test/resources", "project.structure.last.edited": "Problems", "project.structure.proportion": "0.15", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.2", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "cn.yiiguxing.plugin.translate" } }

task.summary:
Set up database schema, entities, and Spring context
- Created ERD model for database schema. - Added Flyway migration SQL scripts to create database tables. - Created and mapped Java entities to database tables. - Set up Spring context and initialized required Beans for application startup.

Set up database schema, entities, and Spring context
- Created ERD model for database schema. - Added Flyway migration SQL scripts to create database tables. - Created and mapped Java entities to database tables. - Set up Spring context and initialized required Beans for application startup.

Set up database schema, entities, and Spring context
- Created ERD model for database schema. - Added Flyway migration SQL scripts to create database tables. - Created and mapped Java entities to database tables. - Set up Spring context and initialized required Beans for application startup.

Set up database schema, entities, and Spring context
- Created ERD model for database schema. - Added Flyway migration SQL scripts to create database tables. - Created and mapped Java entities to database tables. - Set up Spring context and initialized required Beans for application startup.

feat: Implement user account management with address and librarian support
- Added `AccountUserService` to handle user creation and updates, ensuring address and librarian assignments. - Implemented `AddressResolver` to manage address lookup, creation, and updates. - Developed `AddressService` for database operations related to addresses. - Created `LibrarianService` to handle librarian persistence and associations with users. - Implemented `UserService` to manage user persistence and retrieval. - Ensured transactional consistency across services. - Added validation for users, addresses, and librarians to maintain data integrity.

- Add missing @Transactional annotations - Rename LibraryRepository to LibrarianRepository - Replace AddressResolver service with AddressManager - Refactor updateOrSaveAddress method - Use equals and hashCode based on id in User and Address classes - Improve method names for better readability - Add unit tests for AddressManager, AddressService, UserService, and LibrarianService -Change the PreparationDataService extension to DataTestFactory, and better organize the helper methods for tests. - breaking up the enum Role into two enums, LibrarianRole and UserRole - refactoring UserService, LibrarianService, AddressService and AccountUserService

feat: migrate project to Spring Boot, add validation and security - added spring-boot-starter-web - added spring-boot-starter-data-jpa - added spring-boot-starter-validation (Hibernate Validator) - added spring-boot-starter-security - updated project structure for Spring Boot - removed manual Spring context configuration - updated project version to 0.2.1

MESSAGE.value:
Set up database schema, entities, and Spring context
- Created ERD model for database schema. - Added Flyway migration SQL scripts to create database tables. - Created and mapped Java entities to database tables. - Set up Spring context and initialized required Beans for application startup.

feat: Implement user account management with address and librarian support
- Added `AccountUserService` to handle user creation and updates, ensuring address and librarian assignments. - Implemented `AddressResolver` to manage address lookup, creation, and updates. - Developed `AddressService` for database operations related to addresses. - Created `LibrarianService` to handle librarian persistence and associations with users. - Implemented `UserService` to manage user persistence and retrieval. - Ensured transactional consistency across services. - Added validation for users, addresses, and librarians to maintain data integrity.

- Add missing @Transactional annotations - Rename LibraryRepository to LibrarianRepository - Replace AddressResolver service with AddressManager - Refactor updateOrSaveAddress method - Use equals and hashCode based on id in User and Address classes - Improve method names for better readability - Add unit tests for AddressManager, AddressService, UserService, and LibrarianService

feat: Implements unit test, refactoring service class
- Add missing @Transactional annotations - Rename LibraryRepository to LibrarianRepository - Replace AddressResolver service with AddressManager - Refactor updateOrSaveAddress method - Use equals and hashCode based on id in User and Address classes - Improve method names for better readability - Add unit tests for AddressManager, AddressService, UserService, and LibrarianService

feat: Implements unit test, refactoring service class
- Add missing @Transactional annotations - Rename LibraryRepository to LibrarianRepository - Replace AddressResolver service with AddressManager - Refactor updateOrSaveAddress method - Use equals and hashCode based on id in User and Address classes - Improve method names for better readability - Add unit tests for AddressManager, AddressService, UserService, and LibrarianService

feat: Implements unit test, refactoring service class
- refactoring UserService, LibrarianService, AddressService and AccountUserService - rename LibraryRepository to LibrarianRepository - replace AddressResolver service with AddressManager - refactor updateOrSaveAddress method - use equals and hashCode based on id in User and Address classes - improve method names for better readability - add unit tests for AddressManager, AddressService, UserService, and LibrarianService - add missing @Transactional annotations - change the PreparationDataService extension to DataTestFactory, and better organize the helper methods for tests. - breaking up the enum Role into two enums, LibrarianRole and UserRole

feat: Implements unit test, refactoring service class
- refactoring UserService, LibrarianService, AddressService and AccountUserService - rename LibraryRepository to LibrarianRepository - replace AddressResolver service with AddressManager - refactor updateOrSaveAddress method - use equals and hashCode based on id in User and Address classes - improve method names for better readability - add unit tests for AddressManager, AddressService, UserService, and LibrarianService - add missing @Transactional annotations - change the PreparationDataService extension to DataTestFactory, and better organize the helper methods for tests. - breaking up the enum Role into two enums, LibrarianRole and UserRole

feat: migrate project to Spring Boot, add validation and security
- added spring-boot-starter-web - added spring-boot-starter-data-jpa - added spring-boot-starter-validation (Hibernate Validator) - added spring-boot-starter-security - updated project structure for Spring Boot - removed manual Spring context configuration - updated project version to 0.2.1

feat: migrate project to Spring Boot, add validation and security
- added spring-boot-starter-web - added spring-boot-starter-data-jpa - added spring-boot-starter-validation (Hibernate Validator) - added spring-boot-starter-security - updated project structure for Spring Boot - removed manual Spring context configuration - updated project version to 0.2.1

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: migrate project to Spring Boot, add validation and security
- added spring-boot-starter-web - added spring-boot-starter-data-jpa - added spring-boot-starter-validation (Hibernate Validator) - added spring-boot-starter-security - updated project structure for Spring Boot - removed manual Spring context configuration - updated project version to 0.2.1
